tool.name: Beacon2 remove dataset
tool.description: remove all records for one dataset from MongoDB

configfiles.configfile:
@BEACON2_CONF_BASE_ADVANCED@
# Tool-specific settings for remove_dataset record_type = 'genomicVariation' collection_name = 'genomicVariations'

tool.help:
**Beacon2 remove dataset**
**⚠️ Destructive operation** — This tool permanently deletes **all records** belonging to the specified `datasetId` from the Beacon MongoDB.
It affects **every collection** (individuals, biosamples, genomicVariations, cohorts, etc.) for that dataset.
**Use with extreme caution** — this action cannot be undone.
**New features (Advanced section):** - Full custom `conf.py` support (highest priority) - Verbose logging - MongoDB connection settings (already configured via Galaxy user preferences)
Credentials are read automatically from your Galaxy user preferences (or fall back to Docker Compose defaults).
